infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Macro Goal uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice when you describe meals to the AI meal estimator.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Macro Goal needs access to your photo library so you can attach progress photos to your weight check-ins and track your transformation over time.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Macro Goal reads your daily step count from Apple Health to track your activity, calculate calories burned, and award XP for completing daily step goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Macro Goal writes your nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your health profile in sync across all your apps.

plugins.cameraPermission: Macro Goal uses your camera to scan barcodes on food packaging so you can quickly add accurate nutrition information.

plugins.microphonePermission: Macro Goal uses your microphone so you can describe meals by voice to the AI meal estimator.

plugins.photosPermission: Macro Goal needs access to your photo library so you can attach progress photos to your weight check-ins and track your transformation over time.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Macro Goal reads your daily step count from Apple Health to track your activity, calculate calories burned, and award XP for completing daily step goals.
